{{Quote|LMC Convoy! This Captain Riane of the Rebel Alliance. Surrender and prepare to be boarded. No harm will come to your crews if you cooperate.|Captain Riane hails [[Convoy LMC-55c]]|<ref name="FBS" />}}
'''Riane''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who operated in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Captain Riane commanded a force consisting of a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] and a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] during the successful capture of [[Convoy LMC-55c]].
